description_long: This object is a handheld electronic gaming console with a clamshell design, featuring two screens: a larger upper display and a smaller lower touchscreen. The upper screen displays a colorful game interface, while the lower screen shows a menu with various app icons. The device is predominantly black with a glossy finish, and it includes several physical controls: a circular joystick, a D-pad, four action buttons, and three rectangular buttons labeled SELECT, HOME, and START. The hinge mechanism allows the device to open and close, and the exterior of the upper half has two small camera lenses. The overall build appears compact and portable, with a robust plastic casing and visible seams for the hinge and buttons.
description: A black clamshell handheld gaming console with dual screens, physical controls, and a glossy plastic finish. The upper screen displays a game, while the lower touchscreen shows a menu interface.
description_view_0: Front view showing both screens, all control buttons, and the main interface layout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness, hinge, and side profile of the controls and screens.
description_view_2: Rear view of the closed upper half, showing two small camera lenses and the back casing.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the side profile, hinge, and the arrangement of the joystick and buttons.
